title: Define the canonical raw-data foundation for current-season MLB rebuild work
objective: Define the canonical storage/schema target for season-to-date MLB raw stats and the normalized rebuild-ready derivative layer so all later backfill and updater work can proceed without guessing.
paper_only_note: This is paper-only / observation-mode rebuild work. No live model implementation or strategy change is authorized from this task.
required_work: 1. Define the exact canonical storage location for season-to-date MLB raw stats.
2. Define raw versus normalized dataset separation.
3. Define required entities: games, teams, team game logs, pitcher game logs, bullpen/context fields if available, inning/outs/score-state history if available.
4. Separate required fields from optional fields.
5. Define versioning, refresh rules, file format, and partitioning rules.
6. Define what complete season-to-date coverage means.
7. Define how the future daily updater appends previous-day completed stats idempotently and safely.
acceptance_criteria: Concrete spec artifact exists and is implementation-ready
Storage location and schema separation are explicit
Required entities and fields are explicit
Daily updater safety rules are defined
verification: State canonical raw path and normalized path
State completeness definition and updater append rules
